kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Minister
  type ForeignCountry
  type CommunityLaw
  type Territory
  type Return
  type RemovalDecision
  type Removal
  type EntryBan
  type VoluntaryDeparture
  type VoluntaryReturn
  type InternationalProtectionProcedure
  type InvestigationCriterion
  type Measure
  type MemberState
  type Fine
  type VulnerablePerson
  type CouncilDecision
  type Foreigner
  type TravelDocument
  type Passport
  type IdentityDocument
  type Nationality
  type Authority
  type InternationalProtection
  type SIS
  type GeneralNationalDatabase
  type FinalDecision
  type RequestForInternationalProtection
  type AirportTransitVisa
  type ShortStayVisa
  type LongStayVisa
  type VisaCode
  type SchengenBordersCode
  type SchengenAgreement
  type CooperationAgreement20180202
  type CooperationAgreement20181206
  type CompetentRegionalAuthority
  type WithdrawalAgreement
  type BeneficiaryOfWithdrawalAgreement
  type EES
  type ClosedCenter
  type ResidentialUnit
  isForeigner: Person -> Bool
  providesBelgianNationalityProof: Person -> Bool
  ministerCompetentForAccessResidenceEstablishmentRemoval: Minister -> Bool
  isNationalOfThirdCountry: Person -> Bool
  isCitizenOfUnion: Person -> Bool
  isCoveredByCommunityLawRegardingFreeMovement: Person * CommunityLaw -> Bool
  isInIllegalStay: Person -> Bool
  isPresentOnTerritory: Person * Territory -> Bool
  doesMeetConditionsForAccessResidence: Person * Territory -> Bool
  isReturn: Return * Person -> Bool
  isRemovalDecision: RemovalDecision -> Bool
  establishesIllegalityOfStay: RemovalDecision * Foreigner -> Bool
  imposesObligationToReturn: RemovalDecision * Foreigner -> Bool
  isRemoval: Removal -> Bool
  isEnforcementOfRemovalDecision: Removal * RemovalDecision -> Bool
  isEntryBan: EntryBan -> Bool
  accompaniesRemovalDecision: EntryBan * RemovalDecision -> Bool
  prohibitsAccessAndResidence: EntryBan * Territory -> Bool
  hasSpecifiedPeriod: EntryBan -> Bool
  isVoluntaryDeparture: VoluntaryDeparture * Person -> Bool
  leavesTerritoryWithinPeriodInRemovalDecision: VoluntaryDeparture * Person * RemovalDecision -> Bool
  isVoluntaryReturn: VoluntaryReturn * Person -> Bool
  returnsToCountryOrThirdCountryAdmittedToStay: VoluntaryReturn * Person -> Bool
  usesReturnAssistanceProgram: VoluntaryReturn * Person -> Bool
  isAtRiskOfAbsconding: Person -> Bool
  subjectToRemovalProcedure: Person -> Bool
  subjectToProcedureForInternationalProtection: Person -> Bool
  subjectToTransferPushbackRemovalProcedure: Person -> Bool
  riskIsCurrentAndReal: Person -> Bool
  hasNotSubmittedResidenceApplicationAfterIllegalEntryOrDuringIllegalStay: Person -> Bool
  hasNotSubmittedRequestForInternationalProtectionWithinTimeLimit: Person -> Bool
  usedFalseOrMisleadingInformationOrDocuments: Person -> Bool
  committedFraudOrUnlawfulMeansInProcedure: Person -> Bool
  doesNotCooperateWithAuthorities: Person -> Bool
  failedOrRefusesToComplyWithMeasure: Person * Measure -> Bool
  isSubjectToEntryBanNotLiftedNorSuspended: Person * MemberState -> Bool
  submittedNewResidenceApplicationAfterRefusalOrRemoval: Person -> Bool
  concealedFingerprintsSubmittedInAnotherState: Person -> Bool
  submittedMultipleRequestsLeadingToNegativeDecisionOrNoPermit: Person -> Bool
  concealedPriorRequestsInAnotherState: Person -> Bool
  cameForPurposesOtherThanThoseDeclared: Person -> Bool
  isSubjectToFineForManifestlyUnfoundedAppeal: Person * Fine -> Bool
  isVulnerablePerson: Person -> Bool
  isAccompaniedMinor: Person -> Bool
  isUnaccompaniedMinor: Person -> Bool
  hasDisabilities: Person -> Bool
  isElderlyPerson: Person -> Bool
  isPregnantWoman: Person -> Bool
  isSingleParentWithMinorChildren: Person -> Bool
  hasSufferedSeriousViolence: Person -> Bool
  isCouncilDecisionReference: CouncilDecision -> Bool
  isIdentifiedForeigner: Foreigner -> Bool
  possessesValidTravelDocument: Foreigner * TravelDocument -> Bool
  possessesValidPassport: Foreigner * Passport -> Bool
  possessesValidIdentityDocument: Foreigner * IdentityDocument -> Bool
  recognizedAsNationalByAuthority: Foreigner * Nationality * Authority -> Bool
  fallsUnderNationalitiesMinisterCanIssueLaissezPasser: Nationality * Minister -> Bool
  isInternationalProtection: InternationalProtection -> Bool
  isRefugeeStatus: InternationalProtection -> Bool
  isSubsidiaryProtectionStatus: InternationalProtection -> Bool
  isSIS: SIS -> Bool
  isGeneralNationalDatabase: GeneralNationalDatabase -> Bool
  isFinalDecision: FinalDecision -> Bool
  isDecisionOnGrantingProtection: FinalDecision * Foreigner -> Bool
  noAppealPossibleOnDecision: FinalDecision -> Bool
  isSubsequentRequestForProtection: RequestForInternationalProtection -> Bool
  madeAfterFinalDecision: RequestForInternationalProtection * FinalDecision -> Bool
  isAirportTransitVisa: AirportTransitVisa -> Bool
  isShortStayVisa: ShortStayVisa -> Bool
  isLongStayVisa: LongStayVisa -> Bool
  isVisaCode: VisaCode -> Bool
  isSchengenBordersCode: SchengenBordersCode -> Bool
  isSchengenAgreement: SchengenAgreement -> Bool
  isCooperationAgreement20180202: CooperationAgreement20180202 -> Bool
  isCooperationAgreement20181206: CooperationAgreement20181206 -> Bool
  isCompetentRegionalAuthority: CompetentRegionalAuthority -> Bool
  isWithdrawalAgreement: WithdrawalAgreement -> Bool
  isBeneficiaryOfWithdrawalAgreement: BeneficiaryOfWithdrawalAgreement * Person -> Bool
  isEES: EES -> Bool
  isClosedCenter: ClosedCenter -> Bool
  isResidentialUnit: ResidentialUnit -> Bool}

theory T:V {
  ! x in Person: (providesBelgianNationalityProof(x)) => (~isForeigner(x)).
  ! x in Person: (isForeigner(x)) => (~providesBelgianNationalityProof(x)).
  ! m in Minister: (ministerCompetentForAccessResidenceEstablishmentRemoval(m)) => (ministerCompetentForAccessResidenceEstablishmentRemoval(m)).
  ! x in Person, c in CommunityLaw: (~isCitizenOfUnion(x) & ~isCoveredByCommunityLawRegardingFreeMovement(x,c)) => (isNationalOfThirdCountry(x)).
  ! x in Person, c in CommunityLaw: (isNationalOfThirdCountry(x)) => (~isCitizenOfUnion(x) & ~isCoveredByCommunityLawRegardingFreeMovement(x,c)).
  ! x in Person, t in Territory: (isPresentOnTerritory(x,t) & ~doesMeetConditionsForAccessResidence(x,t)) => (isInIllegalStay(x)).
  ! x in Person, t in Territory: (isInIllegalStay(x)) => (isPresentOnTerritory(x,t) & ~doesMeetConditionsForAccessResidence(x,t)).
  ! r in Return, x in Person: (isReturn(r,x)) => (isNationalOfThirdCountry(x)).
  ! rd in RemovalDecision, f in Foreigner: (isRemovalDecision(rd)) => (establishesIllegalityOfStay(rd,f) & imposesObligationToReturn(rd,f)).
  ! rm in Removal, r in RemovalDecision: (isRemoval(rm)) => (isEnforcementOfRemovalDecision(rm,r)).
  ! eb in EntryBan, r in RemovalDecision, t in Territory: (isEntryBan(eb)) => (accompaniesRemovalDecision(eb,r) & prohibitsAccessAndResidence(eb,t) & hasSpecifiedPeriod(eb)).
  ! vd in VoluntaryDeparture, x in Person, rd in RemovalDecision: (isVoluntaryDeparture(vd,x)) => (leavesTerritoryWithinPeriodInRemovalDecision(vd,x,rd)).
  ! vr in VoluntaryReturn, x in Person: (isVoluntaryReturn(vr,x)) => (returnsToCountryOrThirdCountryAdmittedToStay(vr,x) & usesReturnAssistanceProgram(vr,x)).
  ! x in Person: (subjectToRemovalProcedure(x) & subjectToProcedureForInternationalProtection(x) & subjectToTransferPushbackRemovalProcedure(x) & riskIsCurrentAndReal(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (hasNotSubmittedResidenceApplicationAfterIllegalEntryOrDuringIllegalStay(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (hasNotSubmittedRequestForInternationalProtectionWithinTimeLimit(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (usedFalseOrMisleadingInformationOrDocuments(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (committedFraudOrUnlawfulMeansInProcedure(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (doesNotCooperateWithAuthorities(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person, m in Measure: (failedOrRefusesToComplyWithMeasure(x,m)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person, ms in MemberState: (isSubjectToEntryBanNotLiftedNorSuspended(x,ms)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (submittedNewResidenceApplicationAfterRefusalOrRemoval(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (concealedFingerprintsSubmittedInAnotherState(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (submittedMultipleRequestsLeadingToNegativeDecisionOrNoPermit(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (concealedPriorRequestsInAnotherState(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (cameForPurposesOtherThanThoseDeclared(x)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person, f in Fine: (isSubjectToFineForManifestlyUnfoundedAppeal(x,f)) => (isAtRiskOfAbsconding(x)).
  ! x in Person: (isAccompaniedMinor(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! x in Person: (isUnaccompaniedMinor(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! x in Person: (hasDisabilities(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! x in Person: (isElderlyPerson(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! x in Person: (isPregnantWoman(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! x in Person: (isSingleParentWithMinorChildren(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! x in Person: (hasSufferedSeriousViolence(x)) => (isVulnerablePerson(x)).
  ! fp in ForeignCountry, f in Foreigner, t in TravelDocument: (possessesValidTravelDocument(f,t)) => (isIdentifiedForeigner(f)).
  ! fp in ForeignCountry, f in Foreigner, p in Passport: (possessesValidPassport(f,p)) => (isIdentifiedForeigner(f)).
  ! fp in ForeignCountry, f in Foreigner, i in IdentityDocument: (possessesValidIdentityDocument(f,i)) => (isIdentifiedForeigner(f)).
  ! fp in Foreigner, n in Nationality, a in Authority: (recognizedAsNationalByAuthority(fp,n,a)) => (isIdentifiedForeigner(fp)).
  ! n in Nationality, m in Minister, f in Foreigner: (fallsUnderNationalitiesMinisterCanIssueLaissezPasser(n,m)) => (isIdentifiedForeigner(f)).
  ! ip in InternationalProtection: (isRefugeeStatus(ip)) => (isInternationalProtection(ip)).
  ! ip in InternationalProtection: (isSubsidiaryProtectionStatus(ip)) => (isInternationalProtection(ip)).
  ! fd in FinalDecision, f in Foreigner: (isDecisionOnGrantingProtection(fd,f)) => (isFinalDecision(fd)).
}

case.text: Ahmed cannot prove that he holds Belgian nationality. He resides on Belgian territory without a valid residence permit.

questions.text: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of a foreigner within the meaning of Article 1 of this law?

pipeline.natural_language: Unknown. isForeigner(ahmed) is not determined by the law and case facts.
